channel.title: breakfast-brunch Recipes - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh breakfast-brunch recipes and cooking inspiration

item.title: Delicious Sausage and Egg Casserole for Any Meal
item.description: This sausage and egg casserole is an all-time favorite. It's creamy, cheesy, and packed with flavor. Perfect for breakfast or brunch gatherings with friends!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 40 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 55 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound breakfast sausage, crumbled
  • 8 large eggs
  • 2 cups milk
  • 2 cups shredded cheddar cheese
  • 4 slices of bread, cubed (optional)
  • 1 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon onion powder

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
  2. In a skillet, cook the crumbled sausage over medium heat until browned, about 5-7 minutes. Drain excess fat.
  3. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder.
  4. Stir in the cooked sausage and half of the cheddar cheese. If using, fold in the cubed bread.
  5. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
  6. Top with the remaining cheddar cheese.
  7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the top is golden.
  8. Let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easyrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pound #large

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Delicious Sausage and Egg Casserole for Any Meal
media:content.media:description: This sausage and egg casserole is an all-time favorite. It's creamy, cheesy, and packed with flavor. Perfect for breakfast or brunch gatherings with friends!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230422512, Easyrecipe, 1hourmeals, recipe, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pound, large

item.title: Apple Fritter Waffle Donuts: A Cozy Fall Delight
item.description: These Apple Fritter Waffle Donuts are the perfect fall treat. With tart apples and a sweet glaze, they bring cozy vibes to your breakfast table. Enjoy them warm on a crisp autumn morning!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups all-purpose flour
  • 1 tablespoon baking powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon
  • 1/4 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/2 cup buttermilk
  • 1/4 cup milk
  • 1 large egg
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1 cup peeled and diced apples (like Granny Smith)
  • 1 cup powdered sugar
  • 2 tablespoons milk (for glaze)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and sugar until well combined.
  2. In another bowl, mix buttermilk, milk, egg, and vanilla extract. Stir this mixture into the dry ingredients until just combined.
  3. Fold in the diced apples gently, being careful not to overmix.
  4. Preheat your waffle maker and lightly grease it. Pour the batter into the waffle maker, filling it about halfway, and cook until golden brown (about 4-5 minutes).
  5. While the waffles are cooking, whisk together powdered sugar and 2 tablespoons of milk to create a glaze.
  6. Once the waffle donuts are done, drizzle the glaze over them while they’re still warm. Enjoy!

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Mediumrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #tablespoon #teaspoon

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Apple Fritter Waffle Donuts: A Cozy Fall Delight
media:content.media:description: These Apple Fritter Waffle Donuts are the perfect fall treat. With tart apples and a sweet glaze, they bring cozy vibes to your breakfast table. Enjoy them warm on a crisp autumn morning!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230422512, Mediumrecipe, 1hourmeals, recipe, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, tablespoon, teaspoon

item.title: Spring Asparagus Frittata for Busy Mornings
item.description: Need a quick breakfast? This asparagus frittata brings light, fresh flavors to your table in just 30 minutes! Packed with vibrant asparagus and fluffy eggs, it’s great for busy mornings or spring brunches. Give it a try!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 8 large eggs, beaten
  • 1 cup fresh asparagus, chopped
  • 1/2 cup diced onion
  • 1/2 cup shredded cheese (like Kerrygold cheddar)
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
  2. In a large oven-safe skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the onions until they start to soften.
  3. Add the chopped asparagus and cook for another 3-4 minutes until bright green.
  4. Pour the beaten eggs over the veggies, season with salt and pepper, and sprinkle the cheese on top.
  5. Cook on the stovetop for about 5 minutes until the edges begin to set, then transfer to the oven.
  6. Bake for 15 minutes or until the frittata is puffed and golden brown.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easyrecipe #quickrecipe #30minutemeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #fresh #diced

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Need a quick breakfast? This asparagus frittata brings light, fresh flavors to your table in just 30 minutes! Packed with vibrant asparagus and fluffy eggs, it’s great for busy mornings or spring brunches. Give it a try!

item.title: Easy Banana Breakfast Cookies with Chocolate Chips
item.description: These banana breakfast cookies are quick, tasty, and perfect for busy mornings. Made with wholesome ingredients, they're gluten-free and ready in under 30 minutes.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 15

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 ripe bananas, mashed
  • 1 cup rolled oats
  • 1/2 cup peanut butter
  • 1/4 cup honey or maple syrup
  • 1/4 cup chia seeds
  • 1/2 cup dark chocolate chips
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 1/2 tsp baking powder
  • 1/4 tsp salt

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
  2. In a large bowl, mix the mashed bananas and peanut butter until smooth.
  3. Stir in the honey (or maple syrup), vanilla extract, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
  4. Add the rolled oats, chia seeds, and chocolate chips, mixing until everything is evenly incorporated.
  5. Drop tablespoon-sized mounds of the dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
  6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
  7. Let them cool for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easyrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #bananas #rolled #peanut

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Banana Breakfast Cookies with Chocolate Chips
media:content.media:description: These banana breakfast cookies are quick, tasty, and perfect for busy mornings. Made with wholesome ingredients, they're gluten-free and ready in under 30 minutes.

item.title: Breakfast Enchiladas with Creamy Sausage Gravy: A Hearty Start
item.description: Start your day right with these delicious Breakfast Enchiladas smothered in creamy sausage gravy. Perfect for brunch!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 8 large flour tortillas
  • 1 pound breakfast sausage
  • 6 large eggs
  • 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1/4 cup all-purpose flour
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Chopped green onions for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a skillet over medium heat, cook the breakfast sausage until browned, about 5-7 minutes. Drain excess fat.
  2. In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and pepper. Pour the eggs into the skillet with the sausage and scramble until cooked through, about 3-4 minutes.
  3. Warm the tortillas in a dry skillet or microwave until pliable. Spoon some of the sausage and egg mixture onto each tortilla, sprinkle with cheddar cheese, and roll them up tightly.
  4. In a separate saucepan, whisk together the flour and milk over medium heat until thickened, about 5 minutes. Stir in garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
  5. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Spread a thin layer of sausage gravy in the bottom of a baking dish. Arrange the rolled enchiladas seam-side down, then pour the remaining gravy over the top.
  6. Bake for 20 minutes until bubbly and golden. Garnish with chopped green onions before serving.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Mediumrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #pound

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Breakfast Enchiladas with Creamy Sausage Gravy: A Hearty Start

item.title: Air Fryer Egg & Cheese Toast
item.description: Start your day with this quick and delicious Air Fryer Egg & Cheese Toast! It's crispy, satisfying, and perfect for busy mornings or brunch cravings.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 5 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 slices of bread
  • 2 large eggs
  • 2 slices of cheese
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Butter or oil for greasing

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat the air fryer to 350°F (175°C).
  2. Grease the air fryer basket with butter or oil.
  3. Place the slices of bread in the basket and crack an egg onto each slice.
  4. Top each egg with a slice of cheese and season with salt and pepper.
  5. Air fry for 5 minutes or until the egg is cooked to your liking.

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: Start your day with this quick and delicious Air Fryer Egg & Cheese Toast! It's crispy, satisfying, and perfect for busy mornings or brunch cravings.

item.title: Pumpkin Spice Monkey Bread for Fall Mornings
item.description: try the warm, comforting flavors of fall with this Pumpkin Spice Monkey Bread. Perfectly sweet and easy to pull apart, it's a delightful treat for family breakfasts. Try it today for a cozy morning!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cans refrigerated biscuit dough
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 2 tablespoons pumpkin pie spice
  • 1/2 cup unsalted butter, melted
  • 1 cup pumpkin puree

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
  2. In a bowl, mix sugar and pumpkin pie spice.
  3. Cut biscuit dough into quarters and toss in the sugar mixture.
  4. Layer the dough pieces in a bundt pan, drizzling pumpkin puree and melted butter between layers.
  5. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown.
  6. Let cool for 10 minutes before inverting onto a plate.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #refrigerated #sugar #pumpkin

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: try the warm, comforting flavors of fall with this Pumpkin Spice Monkey Bread. Perfectly sweet and easy to pull apart, it's a delightful treat for family breakfasts. Try it today for a cozy morning!

item.title: Creative DIY Valentine’s Day Crafts for Everyone
item.description: Get ready to unleash your creativity with these fun DIY Valentine’s Day crafts! great for all ages, you’ll find heart-shaped decorations and personalized gifts that will make your loved ones smile. Gather your supplies and dive into crafting. Save this for your next project!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • Colorful construction paper in various shades
  • Scissors for cutting shapes
  • Glue sticks or double-sided tape
  • Markers or colored pencils for decoration
  • String or ribbon for hanging
  • Embellishments like stickers or glitter

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Start by cutting out heart shapes from the construction paper. You can make them different sizes for variety.
  2. Use markers or colored pencils to decorate the hearts with messages or designs. Let your creativity flow!
  3. Once decorated, use glue or double-sided tape to attach smaller hearts onto larger ones for a layered effect.
  4. If you want to hang your crafts, punch a hole at the top of each heart and thread a piece of string or ribbon through it.
  5. For an extra touch, add embellishments like stickers or a sprinkle of glitter to make your crafts pop.
  6. Display your creations around your home or gift them to loved ones to spread the love!

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #Easyrecipe #quickrecipe #30minutemeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #colorful #scissors #sticks

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

item.title: Egg and Ham Breakfast Sandwich
item.description: Start your day with a delicious Egg and Ham Breakfast Sandwich that combines savory ham, fluffy eggs, and melted cheese between two slices of bread. This quick and satisfying meal is perfect for busy mornings or leisurely weekends.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 slices of bread
  • 1 egg
  • 2 slices of ham
  • 1 slice of cheese
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Butter for cooking

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Heat a skillet over medium heat and add a little butter.
  2. Crack the egg into the skillet and season with salt and pepper. Cook until the white is set and the yolk is cooked to your liking.
  3. While the egg is cooking, toast the bread in another skillet or toaster.
  4. Once the egg is done, place the ham slices in the skillet to warm them up.
  5. Assemble the sandwich by placing the cheese on one slice of bread, followed by the ham, the cooked egg, and then the other slice of bread.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #quickrecipe #30minutemeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #slices

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Start your day with a delicious Egg and Ham Breakfast Sandwich that combines savory ham, fluffy eggs, and melted cheese between two slices of bread. This quick and satisfying meal is perfect for busy mornings or leisurely weekends.

item.title: Fluffy Japanese SoufflÃ© Pancakes
item.description: Indulge in the light and airy delight of fluffy Japanese soufflÃ© pancakes, perfect for a special breakfast or brunch. These pancakes are not only visually stunning but also melt in your mouth, making them a must-try for any pancake lover.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup all-purpose flour
  • 2 tablespoons sugar
  • 1 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1/2 cup milk
  • 2 large eggs, separated
  • 1/4 teaspoon cream of tartar
  • Butter for cooking

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, and baking powder.
  2. In another bowl, whisk milk and egg yolks until combined.
  3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
  4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
  5. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
  6. Heat a non-stick skillet over low heat and grease with butter.
  7. Pour batter into the skillet, cover, and cook for about 4-5 minutes on each side until golden brown and fluffy.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #mediumrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #sugar #teaspoon

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Indulge in the light and airy delight of fluffy Japanese soufflÃ© pancakes, perfect for a special breakfast or brunch. These pancakes are not only visually stunning but also melt in your mouth, making them a must-try for any pancake lover.

item.title: Fluffy Pancakes
item.description: Indulge in these fluffy pancakes that are perfect for breakfast or brunch. With a golden exterior and soft, airy interior, they are sure to delight everyone at the table.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 250 grams all-purpose flour
  • 2 eggs
  • 300 milliliters milk
  • 50 grams melted butter
  • 2 tablespoons sugar
  • 1 packet baking powder

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a large bowl, mix the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, and baking powder.
  2. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and melted butter.
  3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
  4. Let the batter rest for 10 minutes.
  5. Heat a skillet over medium heat and pour in a ladle of batter.
  6. Cook for 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #milliliters

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Full English Breakfast
item.description: Start your day right with a vibrant Full English Breakfast, packed with flavor and all the essentials to keep you energized. This hearty meal combines the best of traditional ingredients, making it a beloved choice for breakfast lovers everywhere.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 slices of bread
  • 1 cup homemade baked beans
  • 2 tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup mushrooms, sliced
  • 2 sausages
  • 2 eggs

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Toast the bread until golden brown.
  2. In a skillet, cook the sausages over medium heat until browned.
  3. Add the mushrooms and tomatoes to the skillet, cooking until softened.
  4. Heat the baked beans in a small pot until warmed through.
  5. Fry the eggs to your liking in a separate pan.
  6. Serve everything on a plate, arranging it for a colorful presentation.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #mediumrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #slices #tomatoes

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Full English Breakfast
media:content.media:description: Start your day right with a vibrant Full English Breakfast, packed with flavor and all the essentials to keep you energized. This hearty meal combines the best of traditional ingredients, making it a beloved choice for breakfast lovers everywhere.

item.title: Oatmeal Apple Breakfast Bake
item.description: Start your day with this hearty Oatmeal Apple Breakfast Bake, a wholesome blend of nutritious oats and sweet apples. It's not only easy to make but also packed with fiber and protein, making it the perfect choice for busy mornings or a cozy weekend breakfast.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups rolled oats
  • 2 apples, diced
  • 1 teaspoon cinnamon
  • 2 cups almond milk
  • 1/4 cup honey or maple syrup
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 cup chopped nuts (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 350Â°F (175Â°C).
  2. In a large bowl, combine oats, diced apples, cinnamon, and salt.
  3. In another bowl, mix almond milk and honey or maple syrup.
  4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
  5. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and sprinkle with chopped nuts if using.
  6. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is golden and the oats are set.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #rolled #apples #teaspoon

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Quick & Delicious Sausage Egg Breakfast Rolls
item.description: These Sausage Egg Breakfast Rolls are the ultimate brunch bite, combining savory sausage and fluffy eggs wrapped in a golden pastry. Perfect for busy mornings or a delightful midday snack, they are quick to prepare and even quicker to disappear!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound sausage, crumbled
  • 4 large eggs
  • 1 package refrigerated crescent roll dough
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 tablespoon chopped chives (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat the oven to 375Â°F (190Â°C).
  2. In a skillet over medium heat, cook the crumbled sausage until browned.
  3. In a bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt and pepper.
  4. Add the eggs to the skillet with the sausage and scramble until fully cooked.
  5. Unroll the crescent roll dough and separate it into triangles.
  6. Place a spoonful of the sausage and egg mixture at the wide end of each triangle.
  7. Roll up the dough, starting from the wide end, and place on a baking sheet.
  8. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pound #large #package

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Quick Make-Ahead Breakfast Casserole for Families
item.description: Start your day right with this Easy Make-Ahead Breakfast Casserole! It's a delightful dish that combines convenience and flavor, perfect for busy mornings. Try it today and make breakfast a breeze!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound shrimp peeled and deveined
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Heat olive oil in large skillet over medium heat
  2. Add shrimp and cook 2-3 minutes per side until pink

media:content.media:title: Quick Make-Ahead Breakfast Casserole for Families
media:content.media:description: Start your day right with this Easy Make-Ahead Breakfast Casserole! It's a delightful dish that combines convenience and flavor, perfect for busy mornings. Try it today and make breakfast a breeze!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230422512, easyrecipe, 1hourmeals, recipe, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pound, olive

item.title: Easy Breakfast Quiche
item.description: Start your day off right with this Easy Breakfast Quiche! This versatile dish is packed with delicious flavors and can be customized to fit whatever you have on hand, making it perfect for any meal.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pie crust
  • 6 large eggs
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1 cup shredded cheese
  • 1 cup chopped vegetables (like spinach, bell peppers, or onions)
  • 1 cup cooked meat (like bacon, sausage, or ham)
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 375Â°F (190Â°C).
  2. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk until well combined.
  3. Stir in the cheese, vegetables, meat, salt, and pepper.
  4. Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust.
  5. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the quiche is set and lightly golden on top.
  6. Allow to cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #1hourmeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #crust #large

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Start your day off right with this Easy Breakfast Quiche! This versatile dish is packed with delicious flavors and can be customized to fit whatever you have on hand, making it perfect for any meal.

item.title: Cream Cheese-Filled Pumpkin Bread
item.description: Indulge in the warm, comforting flavors of fall with this moist and spiced cream cheese-filled pumpkin bread. Perfect for breakfast or as a delightful dessert, this recipe is simple and requires no mixer, making it an easy choice for any home cook.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 60 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 75 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 10

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups pumpkin puree
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1/2 cup vegetable oil
  • 4 eggs
  • 2 cups all-purpose flour
  • 1 teaspoon baking soda
  • 1/2 teaspoon baking powder
  • 1 teaspoon cinnamon
  • 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 8 ounces cream cheese, softened

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. Preheat your oven to 350Â°F (175Â°C) and grease a loaf pan.
  2. In a large bowl, mix pumpkin puree, sugar, and vegetable oil until well combined.
  3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
  4. In another bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
  5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture, stirring until just combined.
  6. Pour half of the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
  7. Spread the softened cream cheese over the batter, then top with the remaining batter.
  8. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pumpkin #sugar #vegetable

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Indulge in the warm, comforting flavors of fall with this moist and spiced cream cheese-filled pumpkin bread. Perfect for breakfast or as a delightful dessert, this recipe is simple and requires no mixer, making it an easy choice for any home cook.

item.title: Better Than Starbucks: Peppermint Hot Cocoa
item.description: Indulge in the rich and creamy flavors of this homemade peppermint hot cocoa that rivals your favorite coffee shop. Perfectly sweetened and topped with whipped cream, it's a cozy treat for any occasion.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups milk
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup cocoa powder
  • 1/2 cup sugar
  • 1 teaspoon peppermint extract
  • Whipped cream for topping
  • Crushed peppermint candies for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a saucepan, combine milk, heavy cream, cocoa powder, and sugar over medium heat.
  2. Whisk until the mixture is smooth and heated through, about 5 minutes.
  3. Remove from heat and stir in peppermint extract.
  4. Serve in mugs topped with whipped cream and crushed peppermint candies.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #quickrecipe #30minutemeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #heavy #cocoa

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Better Than Starbucks: Peppermint Hot Cocoa
media:content.media:description: Indulge in the rich and creamy flavors of this homemade peppermint hot cocoa that rivals your favorite coffee shop. Perfectly sweetened and topped with whipped cream, it's a cozy treat for any occasion.

item.title: Better Than Starbucks: Peppermint Hot Cocoa
item.description: Indulge in a rich and creamy peppermint hot cocoa that surpasses your favorite coffee shop's version. This delightful drink is perfect for cozy evenings and festive gatherings, bringing warmth and joy with every sip.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups milk
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup cocoa powder
  • 1/2 cup sugar
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 1/4 teaspoon peppermint extract
  • Whipped cream for topping
  • Crushed peppermint candies for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

  1. In a saucepan, combine milk and heavy cream over medium heat.
  2. Whisk in cocoa powder and sugar until fully dissolved.
  3. Add vanilla and peppermint extracts, stirring well.
  4. Heat until hot but not boiling, then serve in mugs.
  5. Top with whipped cream and crushed peppermint candies.

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230422512 #easyrecipe #quickrecipe #30minutemeals #recipe #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #heavy #cocoa

📌 Save this recipe to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: Indulge in a rich and creamy peppermint hot cocoa that surpasses your favorite coffee shop's version. This delightful drink is perfect for cozy evenings and festive gatherings, bringing warmth and joy with every sip.
